Document:
# What's to come? (2828-Present) In present days, Triad Sector holds many opportunities for incoming companies, colonists, and freelancers to do business and restore the ruined economy and infrastructure, yet attention like that could bring harm from those without good intentions. [textlink="Solarian Directive" link="SolarianDirective"]: [color=lightgreen]Jupiter[/color] and [textlink="The Imperial Coalition" link="ImperialCoalition"] plans their return to establish themselves, but not until they destroy the other side or eachother.
On the bright side, fundamental facilities such as the [textlink="Triad Frontier Association" link="TriadFrontierAssociation"]'s Medical Dispatch and Venmar Station are provided and available to all residents of the sector, yet the remnants of the war still lingers. The scars of war might not heal as easily and fast, but the sector always welcomes those with pure intentions with open arms.
